demo.title: memogram.sh
demo.code:
# Read every memo in a transaction, joined to its payment
bankr prompt "Using the memogram skill, read the memos in tx 0xf726…1c4f"

# Read an address's recent memos
bankr prompt "Using the memogram skill, show the last 10 memos from 0xYourAddr"

# Send a payment with an on-chain memo attached
bankr prompt "Using the memogram skill, send 1 MEMO to 0xFriend with the memo 'gm from bankr'"

setup: Set up the memo-mcp server (read-only needs no key): https://github.com/GeObts/memo-mcp
For sends: configure MEMO_PRIVATE_KEY on a dedicated wallet, plus spend caps MEMO_MAX_PER_SEND / MEMO_MAX_TOTAL
